channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: I used the Vivo X300 Ultra for a week, and I can't believe a phone camera is this good
item.description: I used the Vivo X300 Ultra as my daily driver, and there's no doubt in my mind that this is the camera phone to beat in 2026. With two 200MP cameras and class-leading video recording, Vivo outdid itself this year.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Vivo X300 Ultra review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Vivo X300 Ultra review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Vivo X300 Ultra review on Android Central

item.title: The Isai Blue Pixel 10a is a stunning anniversary gift you can’t have
item.description: Google’s Pixel 10a gets a stylish Isai Blue makeover with art-driven features and extras, but it’s locked to Japan.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: limited edition blue for the Pixel 10a held in a woman's hand
media:content.media:text: limited edition blue for the Pixel 10a held in a woman's hand
media:content.media:title: limited edition blue for the Pixel 10a held in a woman's hand

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 is a solid phone that desperately needs a camera upgrade
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 is more expensive and offers a bigger screen, but is that enough? Without new cameras or magnetic charging, I'm not sure it is.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in Black in the hand in front of a lake.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in Black in the hand in front of a lake.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in Black in the hand in front of a lake.

item.title: Best Buy is now slashing up to $300 off the Galaxy S26 lineup when you buy unlocked — who needs Amazon?
item.description: Best Buy has quietly begun discounting the Galaxy S26 lineup on its site, no strings attached.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra in hand
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra in hand
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra in hand

item.title: Samsung's Call Screening may hit the Galaxy S25, but there's more you should know
item.description: An AI calling feature could arrive for the Galaxy S25, but this isn't cut and dry, as some reports said otherwise.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra testing on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra testing on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra testing on Android Central

item.title: Galaxy S26 dashes into April with a security update that made me roll my eyes
item.description: I rolled my eyes so hard as Samsung dropped the Galaxy S26's April security patch, but it's missing something I wish it had.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: The 'genuinely excellent' Motorola Razr Plus is up to $400 OFF at Best Buy this week
item.description: Discounts like this make the versatile Motorola Razr Plus (2025) much more approachable.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: The folded backs of the Motorola Razr Plus 2024 in Green and Motorola Razr Plus 2025 in Mocha

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S27 Pro might be on the way next year, and it could be the mini Ultra I've wanted for years
item.description: Samsung may introduce a Galaxy S27 Pro as a new premium model in its lineup in 2027.

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: I'm obsessed with these over-the-top MagSafe wallets from SUPCASE and i-Blason
item.description: These boisterous SUPCASE and i-Blason MagSafe wallets are upgraded to the max. Equipped with stands and RFID blockers, some even have Bluetooth tracker slots!
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

item.title: Pixel update restores a key feature to the Now Playing app
item.description: Google finally stopped messing with Now Playing and brought back the manual search button to the Pixel lock screen.

item.title: Level up your streaming game with these 4 useful tips for the Google TV Streamer 4K
item.description: Enjoying the Google TV Streamer 4K? Here are a few settings and tweaks that might not be that obvious, but make a huge difference to the streaming experience.

item.title: This unique iPhone 17 Pro selfie case transforms how you take photos — it even has a MicroSD slot
item.description: The Selfix case brings a rear screen to the iPhone 17 Pro, and you even get extendable storage up to 2TB.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)

item.title: My 5 biggest takeaways after using the Motorola Razr Ultra 2025 for a year
item.description: It's been nearly a year since the launch of the Razr Ultra 2025, so I'm taking a look back at my experience with the phone and my biggest takeaways from the last 12 months.
